audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits up to 2 adults & 2 children for a 50% discount. Children under 2 get in free. Museum is closed on Mondays. Pass is not valid for admission to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train or events with a special fee.
